summary: Admin/CRM Refactor Pass 3, 4, 5 - Tested 8 new admin pages. All pages load correctly with table-first pattern. 29/30 backend API tests pass. Minor issue: Vendor detail drawer shows 'Could not load vendor details' because partners collection lacks UUID 'id' field.

minor.issue: Returns 404 because partners collection documents don't have 'id' field - only MongoDB _id which is cleaned. Vendor list works but detail endpoint fails.
minor.impact: Vendor drawer shows 'Could not load vendor details' but table still loads with 22 vendors

integration_issues.issue: Shows 'Could not load vendor details' when clicking vendor row
integration_issues.root_cause: Backend /api/admin/vendors/{id} returns 404 because partners lack 'id' field

action_items: Add UUID 'id' field to partners collection documents OR modify vendor_detail endpoint to lookup by email/name instead of id
critical_code_review_comments: Partners collection lacks 'id' field unlike other collections (users, orders, invoices) - this breaks the vendor detail endpoint pattern
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin/CRM Refactor Pass 3, 4, 5 complete. All 8 new pages working: Sales CRM (/admin/crm), Customers (/admin/customers), Vendors (/admin/vendors), Affiliates & Referrals (/admin/affiliates), Products & Services (/admin/products-services), Business Settings (/admin/business-settings), Users & Roles (/admin/users-roles), Audit Log (/admin/audit). Sidebar reorganized into 6 sections. Only issue is vendor detail drawer fails due to missing 'id' field in partners collection.

features: 3 tabs: Leads, Accounts, Performance
Leads table shows 17 leads with record_type badges
Accounts tab shows customer accounts with order counts
Performance tab shows sales rep cards
Status filter dropdown works
Table loads with 12 customers
Shows name, email, company, orders count, referral code, assigned sales
Clicking row opens detail drawer with customer info
Search filter works
Table loads with 22 vendors
Shows vendor name, capability, active orders, released jobs, status
Search filter works
ISSUE: Detail drawer shows 'Could not load vendor details'
4 tabs: Affiliates, Referrals, Commissions, Payouts
Affiliates tab shows 19 affiliates with status badges
Referrals tab shows events and codes
Commissions tab shows commission records
Payouts tab shows payout records
4 tabs: Products, Promo Items, Services, Groups
Products tab shows 41 products with SKU, price, category
Services tab shows service catalog
Groups tab shows 15 service groups
Search filter works on Products tab
4 sections: Business Profile, Commercial Rules, Affiliate Defaults, Notifications
Business Profile shows company name (Konekt Limited), country (TZ), currency (TZS)
Toggle switches for boolean settings
Save Settings button works
Table loads with 21 users
Shows name, email, role badge, status, date
Role filter dropdown works
Clicking row opens drawer with role assignment buttons (Admin, Sales, Finance, Marketing, Production)
Deactivate User button in drawer
Table shows audit entries (empty initially - entries created on admin actions)
Action filter dropdown populated from /api/admin/audit/actions
Search filter works
Empty state shows 'No audit entries' message

backend_api_tests.sales_crm_leads: PASS - 17 leads returned with record_type enrichment
backend_api_tests.sales_crm_accounts: PASS - 12 accounts with total_orders, assigned_sales enrichment
backend_api_tests.customers_list: PASS - 12 customers with total_orders, referral_code, assigned_sales
backend_api_tests.customer_detail: PASS - Returns customer with orders and invoices
backend_api_tests.vendors_list: PASS - 22 vendors with active_orders, released_jobs counts
backend_api_tests.business_profile: PASS - Returns company profile with TZ defaults
